data.text: ORBITAL OBSERVATIONS REVEAL A WATERY WORLD.
LANDED ON TWO ISLANDS...BLAND BLUE TERRAIN.
BY PARSIS! TURNS OUT THAT THE EQUATORIAL 'OCEANIC' AREAS ARE
REALLY SCRUBLAND, WITH LIGHT GREEN BUSHES AND ORANGEY SOIL!
349,22 HAS SOME REALLY GOOD SCENERY. VISIT RECOMMENDED.
HIGHER LATITUDES HAVE LITTLE VEGETATION, APPARENTLY.
